name: dpdfnet_hr
license: Apache-2.0 (Ceva-IP/DPDFNet — verified 2026-07-24 on HF model tag, same collection as dpdfnet_baseline; OK to redistribute with license text and attribution)
source: https://huggingface.co/Ceva-IP/DPDFNet (profile dpdfnet2_48khz_hr, via k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx speech-enhancement-models release)
notes: Native 48 kHz — same architecture family as dpdfnet_baseline but no resample round-trip either side, so it keeps the full band the 16 kHz baseline discards above 8 kHz. Same zeros-init caveat as dpdfnet_baseline (see its model card): feature normalization adapts over the first ~1 s after reset(). Quality vs the baseline and vs DeepFilterNet not yet judged by ear.
